subject: feat: add long-press cell context menu + unit test infrastructure
body:
Long-press cell actions (mobile):
- 500ms touch timeout on CanvasCellOverlay cell divs
- CellContextMenu component with 3 actions: Add Image (Media tab),
  Edit Text (Content tab), Style Cell (Style tab)
- Each action selects the cell, opens bottom sheet to relevant tab
- Menu anchored near touch point, dismissed on selection or outside tap
- Touch move cancels long-press (prevents accidental triggers during scroll)
- Desktop cells unchanged (no onLongPress prop passed)

Unit test infrastructure:
- Added Jest with ESM support (--experimental-vm-modules)
- jest.config.js with node test environment
- npm test script in package.json
- src/utils/__tests__/cellUtils.test.js: 15 tests covering
  normalizeStructure, getCellInfo, countCells, cleanupOrphanedCells
  (including NaN key handling)
- src/config/__tests__/layoutPresets.test.js: 12 tests covering
  getSuggestedLayouts (null/wide/tall/square/story/tiktok/dedup/max5)
  and getPresetsByAspectRatio (valid/invalid/portrait/landscape)
- All 27 tests pass

Tags: feature, mobile, long-press, context-menu, tests, jest
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: todo-implementation
Semver: minor
